caption: The video captures a professional interview taking place at MongoDB World 2022, held at the Javits Center in New York, NY. Two men, both dressed in suits, are seated at a round table equipped with a laptop and some documents. The interviewer, on the left, gestures animatedly as he speaks, while the interviewee, on the right, listens attentively and responds with his own hand movements. The background shows a bustling conference hall with attendees walking around, adding to the lively atmosphere of the event. The setting is well-lit, with modern decor and signage indicating the event's location and sponsors. The overall tone suggests an engaging discussion about topics relevant to the MongoDB community.
